_readme: News radar source allowlist. ELIJAH edits freely. This is the 'fact-based, non-political' guarantee: it lives in SOURCE SELECTION (primary-source + government feeds are inherently fact-first), not in any single API. Per niche: 'rss' = keyless RSS 2.0 / Atom feed URLs (parsed with stdlib xml.etree); 'gdelt_query' = optional GDELT DOC 2.0 artlist query string (English-only; SUPPLEMENT/discovery, often slow/flaky and skipped gracefully); 'keywords' = relevance terms that boost a story's score for this niche; 'exclude' = substrings (case-insensitive) that DROP a story (political/hype noise). A dead/unparseable feed is logged in news-report.md, never poisons the digest. Add/remove feeds freely; the engine validates each one.

ai-software.gdelt_query: ("AI agent" OR "open source model" OR "large language model") sourcelang:english

money-finance.gdelt_query: ("interest rates" OR "inflation" OR "stock market" OR "federal reserve") sourcelang:english
